ECU HITACHI X91 6x50

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E0
Recv ID: 7E8
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

[
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "11FF",
    "name": "ECUReset Reinit des Apprentissages",

  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
